channel.title: [Archive] George Breakfast - George FM - Visit georgefm.co.nz for more
channel.description: Listen to Clint, Kara and Tammy to hear premium quality chat, the finest in new music, cutting edge content and guests you actually want to hear! [archive]
channel.copyright: Copyright 2017 MediaWorks NZ Ltd - George FM - www.georgefm.co.nz
channel.itunes:author: George FM
channel.itunes:subtitle: Join Clint, Kara and Tammy 6-10am weekdays on George FM. [archive]
channel.itunes:summary: Listen to Clint, Kara and Tammy to hear premium quality chat, the finest in new music, cutting edge content and guests you actually want to hear! [archive]
channel.media:copyright: Copyright 2017 MediaWorks NZ Ltd - George FM - www.georgefm.co.nz

channel.media:description: Join Clint, Pax and Kara 6-10am weekdays on George FM.
